---
title: "Supervision"
---

::: {.page-header}
<div class="kicker">Supervision</div>
# PhD, HDR and research supervision
I welcome strong students interested in health economics, discrete choice experiments, eye tracking, behavioural health economics, decision support tools and applied econometrics.
:::

::: {.content}
## Suitable areas

::: {.grid-3}
::: {.card}
### Health preference research
Discrete choice experiments, best-worst scaling, valuation, preference heterogeneity and patient/public trade-offs.
:::
::: {.card}
### Behavioural health economics
Attention, information processing, feedback, numeracy, decision quality and experimental methods.
:::
::: {.card}
### Policy and evaluation
Vaccine policy, telehealth, rare disease care, chronic disease programmes, economic evaluation and health system design.
:::
:::

## Contacting me about supervision

Please send a short research statement, CV, academic transcripts, writing sample if available, and a clear explanation of how your interests connect with my research programme.
:::
